description:
A fully customizable dropdown element that works with any Bubble data source (option sets, database types, users, etc.). Displays a list of items based on a configurable field name, supports an initial value, optional search bar, and publishes the selected Bubble object as a state. Fires an event on every item click.

Exposed state:

selected_item (type : any) — the Bubble object that was clicked
Event:

item_selected — triggered on every item click, even if the same item is clicked again
name: dropdown
